hero.tagline: Building scalable frontend platforms at Mercado Pago. Passionate about frontend architecture, observability, and AI-driven development.

about.title: About
about.bio: I'm a Senior Software Engineer at Mercado Pago (Mercado Libre), where I work on the Point of Sale ecosystem — platforms used by thousands of merchants across Latin America. My focus is on frontend architecture and scalable web applications, collaborating closely with product, design, and backend teams to ship reliable, high-quality software.
about.bio2: Over the years I've integrated AI-assisted development into my workflow, working with LLMs, AI agents, RAG systems, and vector databases to improve engineering productivity. I also contribute to the technical community at Mercado Libre, organizing talks and sharing knowledge about emerging technologies.

items.description: Leading frontend development for the Point of Sale ecosystem at Mercado Pago. Building scalable React/TypeScript applications, internal component libraries, and driving observability, testing, and AI adoption practices across the team.
Frontend development for the Mercado Pago team, contributing to core product features and engineering practices.
Teaching React.js fundamentals and best practices to hundreds of students in a leading LatAm tech education platform.
Built the OpenBank project for Santander Río using React, Redux, and TypeScript. Also worked on test automation with Testcafe and Selenium.
Developed web applications using Angular, React, and Cordova for clients including Abaco and SoyMujer.tv.
Built web projects with PHP and JavaScript, covering hosting services, domain registration, and internet marketing tasks.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.subtitle: Open to collaborations, technical conversations, or just a good chat about frontend and AI.
